name: Relationship of Parties — Independent Contractors
text: The parties to this Agreement are independent contractors. Nothing herein shall be construed as creating a partnership, joint venture, agency, employment, or fiduciary relationship between them.

legal_basis.note: Definition of workman — avoids employment characterisation
Business definition — independent contractor GST obligation

invalid_if: The actual conduct of the parties, notwithstanding the contractual terms, establishes a different legal relationship in substance.
title: Relationship of Parties
dispute_hotspots: Reclassification as employee — EPF/ESI liability for principal employer
Contract labour regulation — Contractors above 20 workers require licence under CLRA 1970
PF contribution disputes — EPFO audit finding employment relationship
Labour court jurisdiction — dispute treated as industrial dispute if contractor reclassified as workman
